---
title: "Block report"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: report
format-links: false
project:
  execute-dir: project
params:
  block_id: "40080D1SE"
  season: "All seasons"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
# Load packages (tidyverse for data work)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(gt)
library(sf)
library(basemaps)

source("R/plot_checklist_coords.R")
source("R/summarize_breeding_codes.R")
source("R/summarize_effort.R")

# Read in full project data, then filter down to a single block

bird_df <- open_dataset("data/block_summary_seasons.parquet") |>
  filter(pba3_block == params$block_id, season == params$season) |>
  collect() |>
  st_drop_geometry()

ebd_df <- open_dataset("data/pa_breeding_bird_atlas_processed.parquet") |>
  filter(pba3_block == params$block_id) |>
  collect()

report_block_name <- ebd_df$block_name
```

## `{r} params$block_id` for season "`{r} params$season`"

### Species code summary

```{r}
summarize_breeding_codes(bird_df)
```

### Effort summary

```{r}
summarize_effort(bird_df)
```

```{r}
#glimpse(ebd_df)
```

```{r}
set_defaults(map_service = "esri", map_type = "natgeo_world_map")

plot_checklist_coords(ebd_df)
```
